TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Hangan_alang_nniqan_tnpusu_mi_tnhdilan_3ST-SediqSeediqSeejiq_Nation, title = Hangan_alang_nniqan_tnpusu_mi_tnhdilan_3ST-SediqSeediqSeejiq_Nation, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hangan_alang_nniqan_tnpusu_mi_tnhdilan_3ST-SediqSeediqSeejiq_Nation} }

S.FORM: Hangan alang nniqan tnpusu mi tnhdilan 3ST-Sediq/Seediq/Seejiq Nation 當代3ST 2007/1/10; 2019/1/12修訂 Sediq 作者:Watan Diro 1. Alang Sediq Toda : (1) Alang Ungu/Cnuwil/Snuwil (2) Knkingal cida alang : Alang Kdasuc ~ 1Tnbarah 2Ayu Alang Ungu ~ 3Alang Plngebung 4Alang Rukudaya 5Alang Rucaw 6Alang Tbabaw (3) Alang Drodux ~ (4) Alang Rukudaya ~ (5) Alang Toda : 1Alang Tnbarah 2Alang Ayu 3Alang Plngebung 4Alang Rucaw 5Alang Tbabaw (6) Alang Rukudaya (7) Alang Tntana 2. Alang Seediq Tgdaya : (1) Paran (2) Tongan/Strengan : 1Alang Bhebe 2Alang Loyan 3Alang Tugebil 4Alang Iyu (3) 互助村:1Alang Gluban 2Alang Nakahara 3Alang Baysuing 3. Alang Seejiq Truku : (1)Alang Truku 合作村:1Alang Busi 2Alang Sadu 3Alang Truwan (2)Alang Buwarung (3)Alang Pulan 1.Alang Bsuring : 2.Alang Rubas/Murisaka : Alang Tngahan ~ Alang Seediq Tgdaya . 3.Alang Miyamay : 4.卓溪鄉:Alang Blheyngun ~ Alang Sediq Toda . 5.Alang Tawsay Yama Sato ~ Alang Sediq Toda . 6.玉里鎮:Pingting ~ Alang Sediq Toda . Sediq Tnhdilan Sediq Toda : 南澳鄉:Alang Ryayung , Alang Kingyang . 大同鄉:Alang Pyanan , Alang Lmuwan .
S.PHON: ħaŋan alaŋ nniqan tnpusu mi tnħdilan *st-sədiq/səədiq/səəɟiq nation ***st ****/*/**; ****/*/**** sədiq **:watan diɾo *. alaŋ sədiq toda : (*) alaŋ uŋu/ʦnuwil/snuwil (*) knkiŋal ʦida alaŋ : alaŋ kdasuʦ ~ *tnbaɾaħ *aju alaŋ uŋu ~ *alaŋ plŋəbuŋ *alaŋ ɾukudaja *alaŋ ɾuʦaw *alaŋ tbabaw (*) alaŋ dɾodux ~ (*) alaŋ ɾukudaja ~ (*) alaŋ toda : *alaŋ tnbaɾaħ *alaŋ aju *alaŋ plŋəbuŋ *alaŋ ɾuʦaw *alaŋ tbabaw (*) alaŋ ɾukudaja (*) alaŋ tntana *. alaŋ səədiq tgdaja : (*) paɾan (*) toŋan/stɾəŋan : *alaŋ bħəbə *alaŋ lojan *alaŋ tugəbil *alaŋ iju (*) ***:*alaŋ gluban *alaŋ nakaħaɾa *alaŋ bajsuiŋ *. alaŋ səəɟiq tɾuku : (*)alaŋ tɾuku ***:*alaŋ busi *alaŋ sadu *alaŋ tɾuwan (*)alaŋ buwaɾuŋ (*)alaŋ pulan *.alaŋ bsuɾiŋ : *.alaŋ ɾubas/muɾisaka : alaŋ tŋaħan ~ alaŋ səədiq tgdaja . *.alaŋ mijamaj : *.***:alaŋ blħəŋun ~ alaŋ sədiq toda . *.alaŋ tawsaj jama sato ~ alaŋ sədiq toda . *.***:piŋtiŋ ~ alaŋ sədiq toda . sədiq tnħdilan sədiq toda : ***:alaŋ ɾjajuŋ , alaŋ kiŋjaŋ . ***:alaŋ pjanan , alaŋ lmuwan .
S.FORM: Hangan alang nniqan tnpusu mi tnhdilan 3ST-Sediq/Seediq/Seejiq Nation 當代3ST 2007/1/10; 2019/1/12修訂 Sediq 作者:Watan Diro 1. Alang Sediq Toda : (1) Alang Ungu/Cnuwil/Snuwil (2) Knkingal cida alang : Alang Kdasuc ~ 1Tnbarah 2Ayu Alang Ungu ~ 3Alang Plngebung 4Alang Rukudaya 5Alang Rucaw 6Alang Tbabaw (3) Alang Drodux ~ (4) Alang Rukudaya ~ (5) Alang Toda : 1Alang Tnbarah 2Alang Ayu 3Alang Plngebung 4Alang Rucaw 5Alang Tbabaw (6) Alang Rukudaya (7) Alang Tntana 2. Alang Seediq Tgdaya : (1) Paran (2) Tongan/Strengan : 1Alang Bhebe 2Alang Loyan 3Alang Tugebil 4Alang Iyu (3) 互助村:1Alang Gluban 2Alang Nakahara 3Alang Baysuing 3. Alang Seejiq Truku : (1)Alang Truku 合作村:1Alang Busi 2Alang Sadu 3Alang Truwan (2)Alang Buwarung (3)Alang Pulan 1.Alang Bsuring : 2.Alang Rubas/Murisaka : Alang Tngahan ~ Alang Seediq Tgdaya . 3.Alang Miyamay : 4.卓溪鄉:Alang Blheyngun ~ Alang Sediq Toda . 5.Alang Tawsay Yama Sato ~ Alang Sediq Toda . 6.玉里鎮:Pingting ~ Alang Sediq Toda . Sediq Tnhdilan Sediq Toda : 南澳鄉:Alang Ryayung , Alang Kingyang . 大同鄉:Alang Pyanan , Alang Lmuwan .
S.PHON: ħaŋan alaŋ nniqan tnpusu mi tnħdilan *st-sədiq/səədiq/səəɟiq nation ***st ****/*/**; ****/*/**** sədiq **:watan diɾo *. alaŋ sədiq toda : (*) alaŋ uŋu/ʦnuwil/snuwil (*) knkiŋal ʦida alaŋ : alaŋ kdasuʦ ~ *tnbaɾaħ *aju alaŋ uŋu ~ *alaŋ plŋəbuŋ *alaŋ ɾukudaja *alaŋ ɾuʦaw *alaŋ tbabaw (*) alaŋ dɾodux ~ (*) alaŋ ɾukudaja ~ (*) alaŋ toda : *alaŋ tnbaɾaħ *alaŋ aju *alaŋ plŋəbuŋ *alaŋ ɾuʦaw *alaŋ tbabaw (*) alaŋ ɾukudaja (*) alaŋ tntana *. alaŋ səədiq tgdaja : (*) paɾan (*) toŋan/stɾəŋan : *alaŋ bħəbə *alaŋ lojan *alaŋ tugəbil *alaŋ iju (*) ***:*alaŋ gluban *alaŋ nakaħaɾa *alaŋ bajsuiŋ *. alaŋ səəɟiq tɾuku : (*)alaŋ tɾuku ***:*alaŋ busi *alaŋ sadu *alaŋ tɾuwan (*)alaŋ buwaɾuŋ (*)alaŋ pulan *.alaŋ bsuɾiŋ : *.alaŋ ɾubas/muɾisaka : alaŋ tŋaħan ~ alaŋ səədiq tgdaja . *.alaŋ mijamaj : *.***:alaŋ blħəŋun ~ alaŋ sədiq toda . *.alaŋ tawsaj jama sato ~ alaŋ sədiq toda . *.***:piŋtiŋ ~ alaŋ sədiq toda . sədiq tnħdilan sədiq toda : ***:alaŋ ɾjajuŋ , alaŋ kiŋjaŋ . ***:alaŋ pjanan , alaŋ lmuwan .
